"'''Understanding the Jedi Code'''" is an article in [[Star Wars Gamer 1|''Star Wars Gamer'' 1]] that is written by [[J.D. Wiker]]. It covers [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Mace Windu/Legends|Mace Windu]] explaining the [[Jedi Code/Legends|Jedi Code]] using the writings of other [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] Masters.<ref name="Understanding the Jedi Code" />

{{Magazine-stub|article}}
